steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
The question states that $x^5$ can be rewritten as $x^{7m}$ for the same base $x$. Since the bases are equal, equate the exponents:
$$5 = 7m$$

steps.title: Solve for m
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 7:
$$m = \frac{5}{7} \approx 0.7143$$
The answer is 5/7 (equivalent forms: 0.714, .7143).
